metadata.name: AGENTS.md Codex Best Practices
metadata.description: Generates a small, expandable AGENTS.md starter file for AI coding agents with a repository map, optional docs, validation commands, and conventions.

items.name: project_name
items.title: Project name
items.description: Name of the project this AGENTS.md belongs to.

items.name: cfg_dir
items.title: Config directory
items.description: Directory where configuration examples or project config live.

items.name: ansible_dir
items.title: Ansible directory
items.description: Directory where Ansible playbooks, roles, inventories, or automation live.

items.name: terraform_dir
items.title: Terraform directory
items.description: Directory where Terraform modules, stacks, state configuration, or infrastructure code live.

items.name: deployments_dir
items.title: Deployments directory
items.description: Directory where deployment manifests, compose files, Helm values, Kubernetes YAML, or environment overlays live.

items.name: docs_enabled
items.title: Include docs section
items.description: Add a section that points agents to project documentation.

items.name: validation_enabled
items.title: Include validation section
items.description: Add a section for format, lint, test, build, and other validation commands.

items.name: validation_commands
items.title: Validation commands
items.description: Project-specific commands agents should run before finishing changes.

items.name: conventions_enabled
items.title: Include conventions section
items.description: Add a section for project conventions and agent guardrails.

items.name: rule_update_docs
items.title: Update docs for features
items.description: Tell agents to update docs when they add or change features.

items.name: rule_add_tests
items.title: Add tests for logic changes
items.description: Tell agents to add or update tests when changing logic.

items.name: rule_existing_patterns
items.title: Follow existing patterns
items.description: Tell agents to prefer existing project patterns before adding new ones.

items.name: rule_minimal_changes
items.title: Keep changes focused
items.description: Tell agents to avoid unrelated refactors and broad rewrites.
